meaning: United States Information Agency 美国新闻署
examples: On this site USIA informs about U. s. policies and interests in the field of national and global environmental issues.
The secret propaganda of CIA and the overt propaganda of USIA composed the main content of United States propaganda at this phase.
It is striking, however, that the Advisory Commission goes on to recommend that USIA be the locus for this sort of training and the recipient of additional funds to support it.
